mandate: Expert in Mac-specific host architecture and permissions.

checklist.mac_permissions: Verify correct handling of Mac privacy permissions (Screen Recording, Accessibility).
checklist.input_injection_mac: Ensure input injection complies with Mac security requirements.
checklist.audio_capture_permission: Verify that audio capture permission is requested when needed.
checklist.process_priority_mac: Understand that user processes have higher priority than root processes on Mac, and root processes must be suspended when user processes run.
checklist.mac_coordinate_system: Be aware that Mac uses a bottom-left origin for displays, and conversion to upper-left may be needed for consistency with other platforms.
